name: arx
description: Codex plugin for using arx MCP and skills to work with locally cached arXiv papers.

interface.shortDescription: Use arx to ground agents in local arXiv papers.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to the arx MCP server and bundles skills for reviewing arXiv metadata, queueing paper downloads, and searching cached full text.
defaultPrompt: Look up this arXiv paper with arx before summarizing it.
Fetch this arXiv paper through arx and check the download status.
Search my cached arXiv papers with arx.
